steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase highly discerning producers and consumers of material cultures indicates that craft guild members possessed genuine expertise and refined judgment about evaluating handmade objects—critical to understanding what gifting such objects among them would accomplish.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer
steps.content: Gifting handmade objects within the craft guild allows members to display their work to an audience that can truly evaluate it, thereby building and maintaining their professional reputation among their peers. The others either make unsupported guild distinctions (D), invent private knowledge (A), or contradict the expertise premise (B). That matches choice C — C is correct.
